name: Murder By The Sea
overview: A high-profile Bengali businessman gets murdered in Puri, leaving more death and the unveiling of many dark secrets in its wake. And when the suspects become targets, family and friends turn into foes in Murder By The Sea.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Murder By The Sea | Anjan Dutt | Ananya, Arjun, Trina, Paayel | 12th Aug |hoichoi
